title: Delete Custom Action Type
content:
# Delete Custom Action Type

Permanently delete an existing Custom Action Type. An error will be returned if there are any current Custom Action linked to the Custom Action Type. This cannot be undone once the API request has been submitted.

## Endpoint

`POST /custom-actions/types/{name}/delete`

code_examples.code:
from kelvin.api import Client

client = Client(api_key="your-api-key")
response = client.custom_actions.deleteCustomActionType()
print(response)

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Custom Action Type key `name` to delete. Case sensitive name.
